---
name: 📋 spec-tecnica
description: "Use when: generating a technical implementation spec from a GitHub issue; planning what files to create or modify before coding starts; defining API contracts, component structure, Prisma migrations, and a Definition of Done checklist for a feature; refining a technical spec before handing off to the implementador."
tools: [read, search, 'github/*', todo]
model: Claude Sonnet 4.6
argument-hint: "Informe o número da issue do GitHub ou cole o conteúdo da issue. O agente gerará a spec técnica completa pronta para o implementador."
---

Antes de executar qualquer tarefa, leia e siga integralmente:

`ai-engineering/prompts/spec-tecnica/spec-tecnica-prompt.md`
